nasb.text: It came about as they journeyed east, that they found a plain in the land of Shinar and settled there.

esv.text: And as people migrated from the east, they found a plain in the land of Shinar and settled there.

cnv.text: 他們向東遷移的時候，在示拿地發現一塊平原，就住在那裡。

ccb.text: 人们向东迁移时，在示拿地区找到一处平原，定居下来。

csbs.text: 人们向东方迁移，在示拿地发现了一块平原，就在那里住下。
